title: COO heartbeat
summary: Posted Week of April 13 operating review with marketing financial risk tracking. Sent handoff messages to CFO, CEO, and PM. Created activation checklist for paused cabinets.
contextSummary: Five overdue items from April 12 now one week late. CTO owns RT-4. CFO needs pricing/burn/split data. Marketing activation is the highest-leverage unblock — both operationally and financially. April 26 check-in is the hard deadline for the Option A/B decision.
